texto: .....listening means learning to hear someone's inner world and deepest feelings with far greater attention in order that we don't let our own assumptions get in the way. The dying may speak in images far more akin to dreamland than the world of everyday reality. In order to understand them we have to make adjustments to comprehend a poetic form of expression that is sometimes elusive but actually far more expressive than the world of facts.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert L. Wise sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “.....listening means learning to hear someone's inner world and deepest feelings with far greater…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, crossing-over, death, útil em momentos de luto e termino.

texto: If we listen and observe carefully the dying can teach us important things that we need to learn in preparing for the end of our own life's journey.
explicacao: Citação de Robert L. texto: Indeed," Fowler answered. He turned and looked at Tony critically. "I say, old man, but you're not much older than that German kid."Yeah," Tony grinned. "But I'm from Texas and meaner than a junkyard bulldog. Makes a difference, you know.
